scripts.dev:all: pnpm infra && pnpm db:setup && zsh -lc 'set -a; source .env; set +a; typeset -a pids; cleanup(){ (( ${#pids[@]} )) && kill ${pids[@]} 2>/dev/null; }; trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM; pnpm --filter @jinka-eg/api dev & pids+=($!); pnpm --filter @jinka-eg/web dev & pids+=($!); pnpm --filter @jinka-eg/crawler worker & pids+=($!); pnpm --filter @jinka-eg/crawler schedule & pids+=($!); wait'
scripts.infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio
scripts.db:setup: zsh -lc 'set -a; source .env; set +a; pnpm --filter @jinka-eg/api exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm --filter @jinka-eg/api prisma:seed'
